evals.prompt: 我要开始做一个新需求，先帮我看一下 git 状态。
evals.expected_output: 检查当前 git 状态和分支；识别主分支；fetch 最新远端主分支作为基线；默认留在当前分支，不切回主分支、不创建新分支；遇到未提交改动时不丢弃、不覆盖，并报告 dirty-work 保护和 base_sync 状态。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as the start-of-work git workflow
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline without switching branches by default
The run does not create a branch unless the user explicitly asked for branch preparation
The run does not discard, overwrite, or stage unrelated dirty files

evals.prompt: 帮我准备一个新分支来改登录 bug。
evals.expected_output: 识别用户明确要求准备新分支；先检查 git status、识别主分支并 fetch 远端基线；在安全时从最新远端基线创建描述性任务分支；如果未提交改动会阻塞安全创建，则停止并询问如何处理。
expectations: The run honors the user's explicit request to prepare a new task branch
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline before creating the branch
The run does not discard or overwrite dirty work when creating the branch

evals.prompt: 就在当前分支继续，不要切分支。我想改一下登录 bug。
evals.expected_output: 识别用户明确要求继续当前分支，因此不切主分支、不新建分支；仍检查 git status、fetch 主分支基线，并说明会留在当前分支工作。
expectations: The run honors the user's explicit instruction to continue on the current branch
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline without moving the worktree
The run does not create or switch branches when the user opted out

evals.prompt: 我这边还有另一个需求没做完，帮我开个并行的新需求环境。
evals.expected_output: 识别为并行开发场景；检查 git 状态和主分支基线；优先建议或创建单独 worktree/明确的新分支，而不是把当前 worktree 从活跃需求上切走；如本地改动阻塞则停止询问。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as parallel work setup
The run prefers a separate worktree or explicit new branch for parallel work
The run does not move the current worktree away from an active task without user intent

evals.expected_output: 将请求识别为 finish-work delivery；先检查 git status，运行 repo-memory 和相关验证；只 stage 意图内文件；提交后 fetch 目标合入分支并检查是否有冲突；需要时安全 rebase 并重新验证；push，并用仓库常用工具创建 PR；PR 描述包含问题、方案和验证。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as commit/push/PR delivery
The run invokes or accounts for repo-memory before committing
Relevant verification runs before commit or the blocker is stated
Only intended files are staged and unrelated dirty files are left out
The run checks the branch against the target merge branch before push or PR
The run rebases onto the target branch when safe, or reports exact conflict files and blocker
A PR is created, or an exact blocker is reported

evals.prompt: 这个 PR 好像跟 main 有冲突，帮我处理一下。
evals.expected_output: 识别为 base branch conflict check；fetch main，检查冲突文件；如果意图明确就 rebase 到 origin/main 并解决冲突，继续 rebase、重新跑验证并 force-with-lease 推送；如果冲突不明确，就停止并报告冲突文件和需要用户判断的地方。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as a base branch conflict or rebase workflow
The run fetches or checks the target merge branch before resolving
The run prefers rebase onto the target branch for a clean task branch
The run resolves only clear conflicts and otherwise reports exact conflict files
The run reruns verification after a successful rebase before pushing

evals.prompt: PR 开好了，帮我盯一下 CI，如果挂了告诉我。
evals.expected_output: 创建或建议一个 CI follow-up automation/reminder；CI 失败时应通知用户并询问是否开启独立修复流程，而不是直接在主流程里悄悄修。
expectations: The run creates or proposes a CI follow-up using available automation support
The run asks before starting CI repair work after a failure
